body:
The CLI shall support --ids for list subcommands on ADR, SPEC, feature, profile, test, claim, evidence,
issue, risk, boundary, and release surfaces.

If --ids is provided:
1. The result shall include only the requested ids.
2. Unknown ids shall fail the command with an explicit error.
summary: The CLI shall support --ids for list subcommands on ADR, SPEC, feature, profile, test, claim, evidence,
title: CLI list ids selection
